recent_excerpts: Unit 42 traces the Axios supply chain compromise from initial dropper through forensic cleanup — affecting multiple downstream consumers. Full attack chain mapped.
Palo Alto Unit 42 outlines defensive strategies for frontier AI threats — model poisoning, prompt injection, and data leakage — in response to top customer queries.
Unit 42 reports TeamPCP has partnered with Vect ransomware group to target security software vendors in multi-stage supply chain attacks, compromising trusted update mechanisms.
